subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! For Thou hast opened the Doors of the Kingdom of Grandeur
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما فتحت ابواب ملکوت العظمه و الجلال علی وجوه احبائک و ظللت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement
